summary: Iteration 111 - Enhanced Pricing page testing complete. All 17 tests passed. Page features gradient headline, 3 pricing cards (Starter, Growth, Pro) with plan icons (Eye, TrendingUp, Rocket), 'Most popular' badge with Sparkles icon on Growth card, indigo border/shadow on Growth card, billing toggle (Monthly/Annual) with 'Save 20%' text, trust strip with 4 stats, feature comparison table with 13 rows and 3 columns (Growth column highlighted), FAQ accordion (6 items, one open at a time), and final CTA section. All scroll-triggered animations working. Mobile responsive. Homepage, Features, and How It Works pages still work.
passed_tests: Pricing page (/pricing) loads with gradient headline
3 pricing cards render (Starter, Growth, Pro) with plan icons
Starter card has Eye icon, Growth has TrendingUp, Pro has Rocket
Growth card has 'Most popular' badge with Sparkles icon
Growth card has indigo border/shadow styling
Billing toggle switches between Monthly and Annual pricing
Annual toggle shows 'Save 20%' text
Monthly prices: £19, £39, £79 | Annual prices: £15, £31, £63
Trust strip section shows 4 stats (7 days, 0, GBP, < 2 min)
Feature comparison table renders with 13 rows and 3 plan columns
Growth column in comparison table has indigo highlight
FAQ accordion works: click to expand/collapse, one at a time (6 FAQs)
Final CTA section renders with 'Start Free' and 'Browse Products First' buttons
'Start Free' button navigates to /signup
'Browse Products First' button navigates to /trending-products
Page has scroll-triggered animations (RevealSection/RevealStagger) - 14 animated elements
Mobile responsive (390x844 viewport tested)
Homepage (/) still works
Features page (/features) still works
How It Works page (/how-it-works) still works
No console errors (only external 403 from third-party resources)
critical_code_review_comments: PricingPage.jsx correctly implements all visual enhancements
RevealSection and RevealStagger components work correctly for scroll animations with 120ms stagger
Billing toggle state management works correctly with useState
FAQ accordion uses React state (openFaq) to ensure only one FAQ is open at a time
Plan icons correctly mapped: Eye for Starter, TrendingUp for Growth, Rocket for Pro
Trust strip section properly positioned between pricing cards and comparison table
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all testable elements
Stripe checkout functionality preserved (not tested per instructions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 111 verified the enhanced Pricing page. All features working: gradient headline, 3 pricing cards with icons (Eye/TrendingUp/Rocket), 'Most popular' badge with Sparkles icon on Growth card, indigo styling on Growth card, billing toggle with 'Save 20%', trust strip with 4 stats, comparison table with 13 rows and indigo-highlighted Growth column, FAQ accordion (6 items, one open at a time), final CTA section. Scroll animations work (14 animated elements). Mobile responsive. All other pages (Homepage, Features, How It Works) still work. Stripe checkout NOT tested per instructions.
stripe_checkout_note: Stripe checkout functionality preserved but NOT tested per instructions (requires real Stripe keys)
